candidate_definition_hints.text: Segment Anything for Stable Diffusion WebUI

This extension aim for connecting [AUTOMATIC1111 Stable Diffusion WebUI](https://github.com/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui) and [Mikubill ControlNet Extension](https://github.com/Mikubill/sd-webui-controlnet) with [segment anything](https://github.com/facebookresearch/segm…
